title: Otherworldly Insects
description: A study imagining insect-like forms, sculpted in ZBrush and rendered in Cinema4D with a cyanotype-inspired look.

title: Rendez-vous 2030
description: Website promoting the UN’s 2030 Sustainable Development Goals for younger audiences. Visitors explore an animated city to learn about each goal, with content focused on the Swiss context.

title: Hello World
description: Music clip for “Hello World” by Rouge Hotel, unfolding a story through puppet-like animated figures.

title: Cozy Fort
description: This experience spawns a blanket fort under any table. Participants crawl underneath to explore a space filled with toys and objects reminiscent of childhood.

title: Jupiter 7
description: Created for the fictional cult “Children of Elara,” this project uses a four-scroll layout where elements snap together to reveal images, buttons, and text.

title: Liminal Dreams
description: A journey through abandoned, once-familiar spaces, evoking nostalgia and the lingering presence of childhood memories.

title: The Surveillance Desk
description: This platform generates short stories from surveillance clips using AI. Users can choose the genre and remix the narrative.

title: Fishtank
description: Short, looping animation following Slimy Stu and his friends swimming through a playful, VR-sculpted environment.

title: Past / Future
description: A short film imagining a barren landscape reclaimed by greenery, where remnants of human activity meet the slow persistence of nature.
